case_title: ANTOINE ABDULMASSIH VS. O'REILLY AUTOMOTIVE STORES, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,154.75 FILED BY ABDULMASSIH, ANTOINE DBA T&R AUTOMOTIVE CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT O'REILLY AUTOMOTIVE STORES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
(SC-109) AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR -LUIS CASTILLO TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF O'REILLY AUTOMOTIVE FILED BY DEFENDANT O'REILLY AUTOMOTIVE STORES, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABDULMASSIH, ANTOINE DBA T&R AUTOMOTIVE CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT O'REILLY AUTOMOTIVE STORES, INC.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER.(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY ABDULMASSIH, ANTOINE DBA T&R AUTOMOTIVE CENTER O'REILLY AUTOMOTIVE STORES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-09-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ANTOINE ABDULMASSIH IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS PHILIP GATDULA. DEFENDANT O'REILLY AUTOMOTIVE STORES, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SEAN WALKER (STORE MANAGER) AND LUIS CASTILLO (PARTS SPECIALIST). PARTIES CAME TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT TO ATTEMPT TO SETTLE THIS MATTER BY THE NEXT COURT DATE OF MAY-09, APPEARANCES ARE NOT REQUIRED IF RESOLVE AND SETTLED BY THE NEXT COURT DATE OF MAY-09. APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED IF NOT RESOLVE AND WILL HAVE THE HEARING ON MAY-09 AT 3:30 P.M. IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT HEARING, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABDULMASSIH, ANTOINE DBA T&R AUTOMOTIVE CENTER

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (SHAYNE DORWARD FOR DEFENDANT - O'REILLY AUTOMOTIVE STORES, INC.) (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT O'REILLY AUTOMOTIVE STORES, INC.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-06-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF [AGENT FOR SERVICE:CT CORPORATION SYSTEM];SEE SIGNATURE SECTION OF GREEN CARD SERVED OCT-12-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT O'REILLY AUTOMOTIVE STORES, INC.
(SC-109) AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR -SEAN WALKER TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF O'REILLY AUTO PARTS FILED BY DEFENDANT O'REILLY AUTOMOTIVE STORES, INC.
ORDER SC-152 ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL PLAINTIFF APPROVED**
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-07-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-09-2023 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
